class.name: UserSettings
class.brief_description: This class manages UserSettings of the MaSzyna Reloaded simulator

method.name: get_maszyna_game_dir
method.description: Returns the original game data directory

method.name: get_setting
method.description: Reads user setting described by section and key. Returns default value if setting is not set.

method.name: save_maszyna_game_dir
method.description: Saves the original game data directory

method.name: save_setting
method.description: Saves user setting described by key and section

signal.name: config_changed
signal.description: Signal emitted when user configuration changes

signal.name: game_dir_changed
signal.description: Signal emitted when the original game data directory changes

signal.name: setting_changed
signal.description: Signal emitted when user setting changes
